title: What is the Fastest Winter Olympic Sport?
description:
What is the fastest Winter Olympic sport? #sponsored  @NBCSports  @YouTube #winterolympics 

Clocking in at up to 55km per hour are Olympic speed skaters. That’s about as fast as a TIGER can run, all while balancing on a skate only a millimeter thick! 

Next are ski jumpers, but they’re not as fast as snowboarders! 

But the fastest of all…if you guessed it right, subscribe!  #sports  #fastest #speed #shorts
